name: Anita Tsai
eyebrow: Business Weekly Lead Writer | Senior business journalist | Doctoral student
title: Former Business Weekly Lead Writer and senior business journalist
subtitle: Turning complex business trends into clear, actionable knowledge.
summary: Anita Tsai has 22 years of journalism experience, beginning at United Daily News, later working at Wealth Magazine, and then joining Business Weekly in March 2013.

She has covered finance, technology, social trends, and biotech, and later extended her reporting craft into CEO learning products including CEO50, Transformation Lab, and executive community programming.
She is also a doctoral student in business administration at National Sun Yat-sen University, bringing a research lens to companies, industries, and management issues.
positioning: As a senior business journalist, Anita translates fast-moving industry signals into frameworks that business audiences can discuss, learn from, and act on.
sourceNote: Sources: user-provided PPT, English bio, and LinkedIn PDF export.
